issues.title: [Epic · Week 4] Game encyclopedia and versioned content
issues.outcome: Complete the game encyclopedia and versioned content outcome without pulling later platform work into the current gate.
scope: Close the phase only with evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Every child issue has a clear owner, milestone, and acceptance criteria.
Blocked work is represented using issue dependencies.
The phase gate has explicit evidence.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 4 · Feature] Partner and character index/detail experience
issues.outcome: Let players browse partners/characters, understand concise verified information, and navigate to related story, packs, and releases.
scope: Source, version, and spoiler-aware content structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Content distinguishes verified facts, maintainer summary, and unknown data.
Images and alt text pass review.
Cross-links do not create dead ends.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 4 · Feature] Story index, chronology, spoiler controls, and readable content pages
issues.outcome: Provide discoverable story information in original summaries with clear spoiler and provenance controls.
scope: Related partners, packs, songs, and releases.
acceptanceCriteria: No unlicensed long-form text is reproduced.
Spoiler controls work with keyboard and assistive technology.
Long pages meet readability and performance requirements.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 4 · Feature] World Mode, Course Mode, achievements, and game-element encyclopedia
issues.outcome: Create a consistent topic system for current game modes, mechanics, elements, and achievements.
scope: World Mode, Course Mode, achievements, and agreed foundational mechanics.
Related links, version applicability, and source status.
acceptanceCriteria: Reusable template avoids one-off page code.
Search indexes topic titles, aliases, and summaries.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 4 · Data] Per-game-version content intake, validation, review, and publication workflow
issues.outcome: Make game-version updates repeatable without scraping or a production database.
scope: Schema, reference, link, permission, and editorial checks.
acceptanceCriteria: A sample update is executed end-to-end.
Automation validates but does not invent facts.
Review can identify added, changed, removed, and uncertain records.
Rollback to a prior catalog snapshot is documented.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.
